chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Revision Application No.S- 79 of 2022 Criminal Acquittal Appeal No.S- 124 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 11.12.2025. Mr. Muneer Ahmed Kalhoro, Advocate for applicant/appellant. Mr. Muhammad Irfan Chandio, Advocate for respondent No.1. Ms. Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for State. = Learned counsel for the applicant / appellant has filed the report of Mukhtiarkar (Revenue) Taluka Qasimabad dated 19.05.2017, copy whereof is also available in R&Ps as well as the order dated 30.05.2017 passed by the 4th Judicial Magistrate Hyderabad concerning the FIR No.55/2017 alongwith copy of application filed in F.C. Suit No.335/2021 and order sheet dated 13.05.2023 and 11.10.2024, which are taken on record. He relies on the Divisional Bench judgment of this Court reported in 2006 YLR 359 and 2022 MLD 1405, the same are also taken on record. Meanwhile, the counsel for respondent No.1 has filed written objections, the same are taken on record. He supplied its copy to other side. Heard and Reserved. JUDGE Tufail
